title: Mimification
description: A Datapack  & Resourcepack designed to slightly enhance the visuals and recipes of the Transmogrifier mod by integrating Alex's Mob's mimicream.
body:
Designed with both of these mods in mind, this small resource + datapack merges the two mods in texture and recipe, including lang files for the Mimification process and mimicream being captured in the Mimicatalyst texture.

[Transmog](https://modrinth.com/mod/transmog)

[Alexs Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs)

Originally designed for the modpack Inquisitive.
https://modrinth.com/modpack/inquisitive

Credit to Transmogrifier and Alex's Mobs for initial textures
